summary: Admin Panel 'Case Drills' tab feature - All tests passed. Backend APIs (GET/PUT/POST) working correctly. Frontend UI shows stats cards, drills table with 44 rows, toggle switches, 'Custom setting' labels, and Reset to Defaults button.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Case Drills feature fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoints: GET /api/admin/ai-drills (returns 44 drills with stats), PUT /api/admin/ai-drills/{id} (toggles is_free_trial), POST /api/admin/ai-drills/reset-defaults (resets custom settings). Frontend: Case Drills tab in admin sidebar shows stats cards, searchable/filterable table with toggle switches. Changes persist to candidate-facing /api/ai-drills/list endpoint.

backend: GET /api/admin/ai-drills - Returns all 44 drills with is_free_trial flag and stats
PUT /api/admin/ai-drills/{id} - Toggles is_free_trial for a drill
frontend: Case Drills tab visible in admin sidebar
Stats cards: Case Math (24 drills), Case Structuring (20 drills), Free Trial count, Total (44)
Drills table with 44 rows showing name, type, difficulty, questions, toggle
Toggle switch changes drill's free trial status
